s3.storagelens.prefixlevelstoragemetrics: This resource contains the details of the prefix-level storage metrics for Amazon S3 Storage Lens.

s3.storagelens.prefixlevelstoragemetrics.Description: This property identifies whether the details of the prefix-level storage metrics for S3 Storage Lens are enabled.
This property identifies whether the details of the prefix-level storage metrics for S3 Storage Lens are enabled.
